serverInfo.name: openstatus
serverInfo.title: Openstatus
serverInfo.description: Read and update openstatus status pages, status reports, and maintenance windows from any Model Context Protocol client.

authentication.name: x-openstatus-key
authentication.description: Workspace API key. Generate one in Settings → API Tokens. Same credential used by the CLI, REST API, and Terraform provider.

tools.name: list_status_pages
tools.description: List status pages in the workspace.

tools.name: list_status_reports
tools.description: List status reports for a given status page.

tools.name: create_status_report
tools.description: Open a new status report (incident). Requires explicit notify: true | false.

tools.name: append_status_report_update
tools.description: Append an update to an open status report. Requires explicit notify: true | false.

tools.name: resolve_status_report
tools.description: Resolve an open status report. Requires explicit notify: true | false.

tools.name: update_status_report
tools.description: Edit metadata on an existing status report.

tools.name: create_maintenance
tools.description: Schedule a maintenance window. Requires explicit notify: true | false.
